features.scope: point, marker, segment, path, image and text record production
accepted indexed mesh, color, flat Lambert, and nearest-or-linear Texture2D record production
axes, ticks, labels, title, grid and colorbar intent
ranges, reversed ranges and affine transform bindings
producer records used by bounded review examples
limitations: general public session execution is separate

features.scope: experimental explicit open_session, inspection, bounded blocking display, one-frame polling and owned cleanup
limitations: no implicit sessions, retained updates, close callbacks or embedding guarantee
